emails.subject: RE: Bushton Unit 31 Outage
emails.body: RE: Bushton Unit 31 Outage Randy, the time table you have for this outage is 02/26 to 02/28 to replace a section of the exhaust header. If we have cold temps the first part of the week, can this outage be pushed back a few days? Jerry

emails.subject: RE: Bushton Unit 31 Outage
emails.body: Jerry, Attached is a revision to push the outage back one week. In fact it would fit my schedule better this way. Thanks Randy Peschka

emails.subject: RE: Bushton Unit 31 Outage
emails.body: Thanks Randy, we appreciate it. Jerry
